title: Haywen RP
description: The modpack with a Roleplay focus, vanilla feel, species and creativity! Used in the Haywen SMP server!
body:
# The Haywen RP modpack is focused around Community driven content and a unique aesthetic # [ Unmaintained ] ## Empowering Roleplay with **[Origins](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins)**, **[Pehkui](https://modrinth.com/mod/pehkui)** and **[Custom Item Textures](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn)** What makes a good story? An empowering plot? A good setting? To us, it's the collaborative little moments that culminate together to make a fun experience! Play with your friends and grow your character with them - craft the wholesome (and sometimes chaotic) moments with your friends! ###### Including custom clothes! ![](https://img.guildedcdn.com/ContentMediaGenericFiles/f0b51870bbac21bbf9f3d50d0b22db08-Full.webp?w=1840&h=0066) ## Enhanced atmosphere with **Falling Leaves (Fabric)** and **Effective ?** ###### And many cute friends! ## Community driven with **[Minecraft comes alive! (mca reborn)](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-comes-alive-reborn/)** mod, encouraging players to govern their own villages and towns. ## Highly optimised with **[Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)** and **[Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium)** ## Made for creators! with **[ReplayMod](https://modrinth.com/mod/replaymod)** and **[Camerautils](https://modrinth.com/mod/camera-utils)** we've crafted this experience to be enhanced for creators, giving the tools you need for fun content, including [Creator's overlay's](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/creator-overlays) — a rule of thirds overlay, for use in content. And so much more...! #### Thanks to these amazing mods!: # Regarding permissions Permission recieved from: [cebbys_dev](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/1013858280633806851/1047969043484774460/image.png) of Refabricated Slabs (FABRIC)

Permission recieved from: [MehVahdJukaar](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/1013858280633806851/1051156288165396500/image.png?width=685&height=701) of Carpeted Stairs (FABRIC)

Permission recieved from: [TheThanatoros](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/1013858280633806851/1051625631835750421/image.png) of better allay Permission recieved from: [Terrariumearth](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/1013858280633806851/1072995058871177287/image.png) of Lil'wings
